workspace-wiring-check.evidence: pnpm-workspace.yaml updated with `packages/*` and `apps/*`. package.json in apps/web depends on workspace:* for config.

circular-dependency-check.evidence: madge --circular apps/web packages returns 'No circular dependency found!'.

runtime-smoke-proof.evidence: npm run test:e2e passed 10/10 smoke routes. App boots successfully.

build-gate.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build -> Exit 0. Moved files: /SOCELLE-WEB -> /apps/web, /packages/config.
